name: Knowledge of the White Forest
desc:
Target 1 "White Forest" card you control; its effects cannot be negated for the rest of this turn, then you can add 1 Spell from your GY to your hand.
If this card is sent to the GY to activate a monster effect: You can Set this card.
You can only use each effect of "Knowledge of the White Forest" once per turn.
strings: [Quick] Target 1 White Forest card to protect its effects
[Quick] Add 1 Spell from GY to hand
